title: Familiar Fascination [Cobblemon Addon]
description: An unofficial addon for Cobblemon made by Lapori. It adds Familiars from a project called Familiar Fascination. Enjoy!
body:
Adds Familiars from the planned game Familiar Fascination to the Minecraft mod Cobblemon. 
Cobblemon is required in your mod folder for the datapack to work.
This datapack is made for the ability to catch, train and evolve like:
Clost, Clokay, Ermasset, Brickontrollded, Pilorock, Bevo, Kapilu, Walpaca, Knitten, Calicarf and Bowhiskers. If you want these creatures in your game you can download this datapack.
Put it in both the resource pack slot and the data pack slot.
